## Checklist

- [ ] Skill follows repository conventions (clear when-to-use, workflow guidance, testable behavior)

- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated in `tests/`
- [ ] `docs/` updated if a new skill or major capability is added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
